_comment: Build-time, public config per rulebook §12. Firebase web API key and Desktop OAuth client ID are public-by-design (security comes from Firestore rules + per-user OAuth consent).

GoogleOAuth._clientSecretNote: Google requires client_secret for Desktop OAuth token exchange. Per Google's own docs the value is not actually secret for installed apps — it's bundled into every distributed copy of the binary. Treat as public, like the API key.
